_doc: DRIFT unlock schedule from defillama.com/unlocks/drift. 64.77% unlocked / 35.23% × 1b = 352.3m DRIFT locked. Multiple concurrent linear schedules per DL event panel: Strategic Participants over 5y from May 15 2024 (40.02% of allocation, 65.54% of float); Ecosystem Development over 5y from same date (36% / 58.96%); Protocol Development over 1y 6mo from Nov 14 2025; an extra 1y Strategic Participants tail from May 15 2025. Aggregates 644K DRIFT/day forward.

events.note: Strategic Participants 219,143 DRIFT/day × 1826 days (5y). 40.02% of original 22% allocation = 88m fully vested by end? Cross-check needed; using daily-rate primary.
Ecosystem Development & Trading Rewards 197,143 DRIFT/day × 1826 days.
Strategic Participants additional 1y tail (May 25 → May 26 — basically ended today). Kept for historical TP.
Protocol Development 228,143 DRIFT/day × 547 days (1y 6mo from Nov 14 2025).
